description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent gable roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in white, and the house sits on a rectangular green lawn base. The front facade includes a large window with a grid pattern and a circular accent window, as well as a covered porch area. The side and rear elevations have fewer windows, with one side showing a long horizontal window and the other a smaller window near the back. The roof overhangs provide shade and architectural interest, while the overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story white bungalow with a gray gable roof, large front windows, and a covered porch, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large grid window, circular accent window, and covered porch.
description_view_1: Rear view with minimal window openings and a clear view of the roof's overhang.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the extended roof, a long horizontal window, and the porch's side wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single window and the side of the porch visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical front with grouped windows and side horizontal window
